title: task
description: node_channel.py:63 - create_task() returns a Task that is never awaited or stored. If self._node.send() raises an exception, the task's exception goes unhandled (only logged as 'Task exception was never retrieved' in stderr). Callers have no way to know sends failed. Failure scenario: node.send() fails due to routing error or link failure; message is silently dropped with no logging; debugging is difficult because no error is visible.
close_reason: Fixed: task ref stored with done callback to log exceptions (at coap/node_channel.py, not client/)
